properties.titulo_evento: Russian troops survive just 20-30 minutes on Ukraine’s front lines, CIA director says
properties.descricao: Russian recruits arriving on the battlefield in Ukraine survive an estimated 20 to 30 minutes before they are killed or wounded, the CIA director said.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump unveils report on alleged Chinese election meddling

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Tehran warns of wider disruption amid US strikes

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US military attacks Iran for sixth night running
properties.descricao: US Central Command said that a new wave of strikes was launched on Iran. It follows retaliatory strikes from Iran on sites in Jordan and Gulf states. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Italy: Ex-highway head sentenced to 12 years for deadly bridge collapse
properties.descricao: The collapse of the Morandi bridge in Genoa in 2018 killed 43. The court found the former Italian highway CEO guilty of neglecting maintenance despite prior warnings and sentenced him to 12 years in prison.

properties.titulo_evento: As the world rearms, South Korea aims to cash in
properties.descricao: Weapons and military equipment produced in South Korea are sought-after due to their reliability, speedy delivery times and relatively low prices. Global demand for weapons has surged after Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany massively expands federal police powers

properties.titulo_evento: Germany may make it illegal to deny Israel's right to exist
properties.descricao: Germany's upper house of parliament, the Bundesrat, has introduced a bill seeking to ban the questioning of Israel's right to exist. It is now up to the lower house to decide whether to turn it into law.

properties.titulo_evento: What's behind the Iran regime's 'revenge propaganda'?
properties.descricao: Calls for revenge over the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei are growing louder in Iran. Through increasingly harsh rhetoric, the leadership is seeking to mobilize supporters at home while warning opponents abroad.

properties.titulo_evento: US slaps 25% tariffs on Brazil with election looming
properties.descricao: The US will impose a 25% tariff on most imports from Brazil starting later this month. It's the first action in the Trump administration's new tariff strategy, after the Supreme Court struck down its prior impositions.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine lawmakers approve Koretskyi as new PM amid protests
properties.descricao: It is President Volodymyr Zelenskyy's second Cabinet shakeup in a year. He faces criticism for dismissing reformist Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Inland shipping under strain as rivers run low
properties.descricao: Drastically low water levels in Germany's rivers has disrupted shipping on several major rivers. Meanwhile, police have recorded a striking rise in e-scooter crashes causing injury or death.
